title: antidesma cochinchinense
intro: Antidesma cochinchinense, also known as the five-angled milkberry or five-angled fruit, is a species of flowering plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine, particularly in Southeast Asia, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Antidesma cochinchinense include its potential to lower blood sugar levels, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are believed to provide relief from various health conditions.
